quotes.text: The biggest risk is not taking any risk. In a world that is changing really quickly, the only strategy that is guaranteed to fail is not taking risks.
quotes.author: Mark Zuckerberg

quotes.text: The indie hacker's nightmare isn't failure. It's spending 2 years building something that gets 3 users.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Every codebase has that one file that nobody dares to touch. That file is your biggest risk.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Every line of code is a liability. Every feature is a bet. Every deploy is a risk. Ship accordingly.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The biggest risk is not taking any risk.
quotes.author: Mark Zuckerberg
